_publications._publicationTitle: Selective inhibition of BRAF and CRAF sensitizes NF1-deficient malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors to MEK inhibitors.

_contextSnippet: A notable benefit of the combination in reducing tumor growth was observed in three models, JH-2–002, ST8814 and MA1334, and additive anti-tumor activity was seen in JH-2-079c
details: Notable benefit of LXH254 plus trametinib combination in reducing tumor growth observed in three models (JH-2-002, ST8814, MA1334), with additive anti-tumor activity in JH-2-079c
